52949:28014.name: Format=24 hour, Orientation=Horizontal
52949:28014.description:
🔍Time picker in dial mode 
-- 
📖 Time pickers help users select and set specific times.
-- 
🔧Selected versions of each hour can be toggled on / off within 'Hour X' frames 
🔧Swap Input Field and/or Period Selector instances to change state

57994:10132.name: Type=Round, Size=Small, Width=Default, State=Enabled
57994:10132.description:
Standard Icon buttons are low-emphasis buttons.
They are used for the lowest priority actions, especially when presenting multiple options.

Icon buttons can be placed on a variety of backgrounds. Until the button is interacted with, its container isn’t visible.
